Social Security Administration
Office of Disability Benefits
Case No. SSA-2025-00891

March 10, 2025

Erik Nilsson
123 Main Street, Apt 4B
Portland, OR 97201

RE: Notice of Benefits Determination

Dear Mr. Nilsson,

We have completed our review of your application for Social Security
Disability Insurance (SSDI) benefits, filed on January 15, 2025.

DETERMINATION: Your application has been APPROVED.

Based on the medical evidence provided, including records from
Dr. Patricia Hernandez at OHSU and the independent medical evaluation
conducted on February 20, 2025, we have determined that you meet the
criteria for disability benefits under Section 223 of the Social
Security Act.

BENEFIT DETAILS:
- Monthly benefit amount: $2,450.00
- Effective date: April 1, 2025
- First payment: May 3, 2025 (includes retroactive amount of $2,450.00)
- Payment method: Direct deposit to account ending in 7823

If you disagree with this determination, you have 60 days from the date
of this letter to file an appeal. Appeals should be directed to:

Social Security Administration
Office of Hearings Operations
1234 Federal Plaza, Suite 200
Portland, OR 97204

Sincerely,

Anna Chen
Claims Examiner
Social Security Administration
Phone: (800) 772-1213
